74347.subject: cenová ponuka
74347.body:
Dobrý deň Vám prajem, 

na základe nášho stretnutia Vám posielam spracovanú cenovú ponuku.

Cenová ponuka je orientačná a nezáväzná, čokoľvek sa môže zmeniť, upraviť, pridať, ubrať. Výsledná suma vždy závisí od konkrétnych predstáv a požiadavok klienta, od druhu a množstva použitých živých a všetkých ostatných materiálov. 

Štandardne pracujeme tak, že takto dopredu pred svadbou pripravujem ponuku, ktorá je orientačná. Ťažko dopredu určiť presnú sumu a takisto ani Vy nemusíte ešte teraz presne vedieť koľko príde nakoniec hostí, ako sa bude sedieť, koľko stolov budete potrebovať, ako sa môžu zmeniť Vaše predstavy. :-)
Zhruba dva týždne pred svadbou, ako som už spomínala, prípadne podľa potreby skôr sa pripraví predbežná kalkulácia, ktorá sa vyrátava už na základe reálnych počtov položiek a požiadavok a v neposlednom rade počtu hostí.
Všetko je to v prvom rade o komunikácii. Snažím sa jednať s ľuďmi fér, seriózne a k práci pristupovať zodpovedne.
Myslím, že sa dá na mňa v čomkoľvek obrátiť a spoľahnúť. 

Kľudne si ponuku preštudujte a ak by ste mali akékoľvek otázky, chceli sa na čokoľvek opýtať, ak by ste chceli niečo zmeniť, pridať, ubrať, prípadne nastaviť si výšku budgetu kľudne sa na mňa obráťte, rada Vám odpoviem, pomôžem, poradím. 
Všetko som pripravila tak, aby to bolo čo najjednoduchšie pochopiteľné. Ak by bolo čokoľvek nejasné, pýtajte sa.

Ak som na niečo zabudla kľudne ma doplňte. 😉

Budem čakať za Vašou spätnou väzbou.

Prajem krásny deň.



S pozdravom / Best regards

Bc. Lucia Ortutová
Event manager/wedding coordinator

+421 907 382 402
www.dekoracnyservis.sk
info@dekoracnyservis.sk

74335.subject: The Daily Degen - June 10th, 2026
74335.sender: The Daily Degen from The Daily Degen <thedailydegen@substack.com>
74335.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-10th-2026

Happy Wednesday friends! Tons of stuff going on!
Let’s dive in!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles)
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.207T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $695.30
Gold: $4,081.90
Silver: $63.63
Oil (WTI): $90.55
US 10Y Treasury: 4.544%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 15
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Big announcement from the legends at @maplefinance [ https://substack.com/redirect/828ddc83-6a5f-4550-afef-6163efc80d97?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] - $HYPE is now accepted as collateral!
As stated in the official announcement below:
“$HYPE is accepted collateral at Maple. 
Institutions holding it can borrow against their position on tailored, overcollateralized terms, structured and managed by the Maple credit team. 
No selling required.”
There are tons of other cool things going on as well, and if you want to learn all about them, check out the recent interview that Maple co-founder @syrupsid [ https://substack.com/redirect/0c96df1f-f424-4baa-8e35-f59ebd72802c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] did with @Genfinity below!
And- as always- make sure to follow Maple on Twitter [ https://substack.com/redirect/828ddc83-6a5f-4550-afef-6163efc80d97?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates too, and stay tuned as we continue bringing attention to everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mostly red today. Best-performing top 25 chain on the weekly is Ink (#13) at +27.01%. 
Protocols are mixed today. Best-performing top 50 protocol on the weekly is Sentora (#25) at +23.60%. 
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Chains By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $20M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $20M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 10 Entities By 7 Day Revenue Generation (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at least some of our mutuals… Disclaimer: these are not pre-vetted by us so make sure to DYOR!)
-New project called @tradeonpear. Twitter bio states “Trade your instincts.” Followed by 14 of our mutuals. h/t @rektonomist_:
-New project called @olivetreeyield. Twitter bio states “Stablecoin-powered annuities”. Followed by 14 of our mutuals. h/t @lmrankhan:
Top Stablecoin Yields
(note: these are the top Stablecoin Yields, sourced from @DefiLlama (all types, $10M+ TVL o
